name: volunteer-connect
description: Fundação local do projeto Volunteer Connect.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.ci: npm run lint:check && npm run format:check && npm run check && npm test
scripts.lint:check: npm --prefix backend run lint:check && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix backend run format:check && npm --prefix frontend run format:check
scripts.format: npm --prefix backend run format && npm --prefix frontend run format
scripts.check: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run check
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend test
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run format && npm run check && npm test
